title: ESC Poll – Who Will Win the Beatdown in E-Town Exhibition?
excerpt: Who will be the champion of the Beatdown in E-town PSA Pros vs ESC Pros be? Rank the order of the finishers for the round-robin tournament. If you guess the correct order of the finishers you will be entered in a draw and could win $25 to the ESC Pro Shop!
content:
Who will be the champion of the Beatdown in E-town PSA Pros vs ESC Pros be? Rank the order of the finishers for the round-robin tournament.

If you guess the correct order of the finishers you will be entered in a draw and could win $25 to the ESC Pro Shop!
